allow: Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\([r.rule for r in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); with app.test_client\(\) as c: r = c.get\('/'\); print\(r.status_code, r.data[:200]\)")
Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); app.run\(host='127.0.0.1', port=5000\)")
